The Court set status on the settlement conference and trial setting for July 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Petition For Order Directing Payment Of Life Insurance And 401(K) Plan Proceeds To Trust
Off Calendar Oct-05-2010 Continued To Dec-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Russell Rowen for Marjorie Mackey. James Barringer for Sheila Mackey, Lisa Mackey, and John Mackey Jr.

The Court stated that it understood that mediation had stalled. Mr. Rowan stated that his client is leery of people who want to take her bed, etc. Off the record, discussions regarding mediation and availability were held.

On the record at the second call of the matter, the Court stated that discussions regarding mediation and the parties availability had been held and that the matter was continued to December 7, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the mediation. Parties were instructed to notify the Court if the matter settles.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: none present.

Petition For Order Directing Payment Of Life Insurance And 401(K) Plan Proceeds To Trust
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Continued To Oct-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for Sheila Mackey, Lisa Mackey and John Mackey. Russell Rowen for Marjorie Mackey.

Counsel stated that they were close to agreeing on a Trustee, that it looked like they were going to put an independent Party from the East Bay in place and that they agreed to a mediator (Caroline Hinshaw). The Court informed Counsel that an ex parte application for appointment of Successor Trustee and addressing the bond issue needed to be filed. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than October 1, 2010. Counsel is to report the outcome of mediation to the Probate Examiner by that date as well. The matter was continued to October 5, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition For Order Directing Payment Of Life Insurance And 401(K) Plan Proceeds To Trust
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Continued To Aug-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Petitioner'S Application For A Prelimniary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for Sheila Mackey, Lisa Mackey and John Mackey. Russell Rowen for Marjorie Mackey.

Mr. Barringer proposed that the hardship could be resolved if they had UBS and EATNA deposit proceeds with the Court and use those funds to cure any default on the mortgage for the condominium. Mr. Rowen argued that if the insurance policies are Ms. Mackey's, that she would be loaning money to the Trust and that the arrearages should be cured with Trust assets not Ms. Mackey's personal funds. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. Petitioners Exhibit 1 (document from UBS Financial Planning Services) was marked for identification. The Court granted the Petition for Preliminary Injunction (subject to the written order) with the condition that the Trust bring the mortgage on the King Street property current, and pay for the maintenance and expenses of the condominium. Mr. Rowen informed the Court that there is no acting Trustee. Counsel agreed to a minimum undertaking of $10,000.00, to work on selecting a Trustee and mediation. Mr. Barringer will draft a stipulation and order, circulate it to Mr. Rowen for approval as to form and present it to the Court. The pending August 2, 2010 hearing date was continued to August 3, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Petitioner'S Application For A Prelimniary Injunction
Off Calendar Jun-18-2010 Continued To Jul-15-10 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for Sheila Mackey. Russell Rowen for Marjorie Mackey. Philip McLeod for UBS Financial Services.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The matter was continued to July 15, 2010 at 2:00 p.m., in Dept. 204 for further briefing. Briefs are due by July 12, 2010. The temporary restraining order as to the life insurance policy is extended to July 15, 2010. The temporary restraining order as to the 401K is dissolved. Mr. Barringer is to prepare the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
